integrity.diagnosis: 52 records with real LLM activity (in=5157, out=2941 tokens, $0.0199).

baselineSurface: Extract the transaction info from the message as JSON.
winnerSurface: Extract transaction information and return a JSON object with these exact keys: merchant (string), amount (bare number, no currency symbol), date (ISO YYYY-MM-DD format), category (one of: groceries, dining, transport, utilities, entertainment). Include no other fields.
